examples: The room was decorated in vibrant blues and yellows.
The room was decorated in vibrant reds and yellows.
This clump of paper birch trunks was backlit by a blaze of reds and yellows.
The 2012 Emmy Awards red carpet was a flurry of blues, yellows and glitz.
Bright red and neon yellow interiors will be replaced with muted oranges, yellows and subtle greens.
